description: You are configuring GPredict for an international space cooperation office in Geneva that tracks satellites by owning space agency. Create a 'NASA_Assets' module containing ISS (ZARYA) (NORAD 25544), ISS (NAUKA) (NORAD 49044), and SUOMI NPP (NORAD 37849). Create a 'CNSA_Assets' module containing CSS (TIANHE) (NORAD 48274), CSS (WENTIAN) (NORAD 53239), CSS (MENGTIAN) (NORAD 54216), FENGYUN 3A (NORAD 32958), and FENGYUN 3B (NORAD 37214). Delete the 'Amateur' module. Add ground stations for Geneva, Switzerland (46.2044 N, 6.1432 E, 375m) and Beijing, China (39.9042 N, 116.4074 E, 43m). Configure the system to display UTC time for all timestamps. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
